topIngredients.name: Vitamin A (Retinyl Palmitate)
topIngredients.benefit: Promotes skin cell renewal for smoother texture

topIngredients.name: Vitamin E (Tocopherol)
topIngredients.benefit: Antioxidant that repairs scar tissue and stretch marks

topIngredients.name: Calendula Extract
topIngredients.benefit: Soothes skin inflammation and supports healing

verdict: Bio-Oil is clinically tested for scar and stretch mark reduction. The vitamin A and E combination in a lightweight oil base is genuinely effective for improving skin texture over time. Non-comedogenic and versatile for face and body.
